Akhtar also criticised Varun Chakaravarthy’s costly spell and urged India to play Kuldeep Yadav, calling him the “missing link” and a proven match-winner.

Explained: Why US govt keeps shutting down & how India avoids such financial crises
description: America faces recurring government shutdowns. These are not due to a lack of money but a failure to pass spending bills. Recent shutdowns have impacted various agencies, causing furloughs and service disruptions. These funding crises stem from political disagreements, not financial insolvency. India's parliamentary system prevents similar administrative paralysis.

'Ghost GDP': How AI boom could upend middle-class workers, global finance
description: In 2026, the global economic narrative has shifted from the initial excitement of AI to a more calculated and sometimes cautious phase. Citrini Research highlights a move away from the basic hardware race toward "Phase 2" of the AI trade, where the focus lies on operational efficiency and the displacement of high-cost human labor.  While corporate margins are expanding through automation and lean structures, there is a growing concern over "Ghost GDP".

title: Anthropic engineer’s doomsday warning: AI agents will take over engineers, designers and …
description: Anthropic engineer Borsi Cherny warns that advanced AI agents, like Claude Code, will soon transform nearly all computer-based jobs, potentially eliminating roles like software engineer by 2026.  He urges workers to adapt and embrace these tools, as similar concerns about AI's impact on entry-level positions are echoed by Federal Reserve Governor Michael Barr and Oxford Economics.

title: Unusual ancient gene governs sex of ant, bee, wasp newborns
description: Research has found that in ants, bees, and wasps, the sex can depend on whether or not an embryo inherits two different copies of one DNA patch. The findings point to a practical way to check genetic variety and reduce the risk of these sterile males in breeding and conservation

title: Connor McDavid and Lauren Kyle McDavid combined net worth 2026
description: The success of the professional career of Connor McDavid and his wife, Lauren Kyle McDavid, is reflected in the financial empire they have created. Whether it is McDavid and his lucrative Edmonton Oilers contract and endorsement book or the growing design and hospitality businesses of Lauren, the two have a combined net worth in 2026 that can be seen as a wise investment, brand strength and long-term excellence on and off the ice.

title: FBI warns of ATM Jackpotting incidents across America: What are they, how they work & how to detect one
description: ATM jackpotting malware is on the rise, with cybercriminals exploiting physical and software flaws to dispense cash without legitimate transactions.  The FBI warns of significant losses, highlighting how malware like Ploutus bypasses bank authorization by directly controlling ATM hardware.  Physical indicators like open doors and unauthorized devices signal potential compromise, urging immediate action.
